name: agenticbear
description: Build and manage a personal army of AI agents — use them inside Claude Code CLI via MCP

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @subagent/server" "wait-on tcp:3001 && npm run dev -w @subagent/client"
scripts.build: npm run build:client && npm run build:server
scripts.build:server: node_modules/.bin/esbuild packages/server/src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --format=esm --external:better-sqlite3 --external:fsevents --outfile=dist/server.js --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);"
